name: create-voice-persona
description: Build a complete, reusable voice persona package for any person from examples of their real writing — the generalised factory behind the create-luke-content pattern. Mines a writing corpus into an evidence-anchored base voice (every rule traced to a quoted sample), layers purpose-tailored persona variants on top (LinkedIn posts as the flagship, grounded in bundled LinkedIn engagement deep research plus any user-supplied research; plus long-form, marketing, short-form, chat, email, code review, speaker notes), generates a per-person deterministic voice lint, and bundles a distilled 'Signs of AI writing' field guide (from Wikipedia's WP:AISIGNS) so everything the persona writes avoids every known AI tell. Delivers a ready-to-install create-X-content plugin skill or a portable docs folder. v1.1 adds a stylometric layer grounded in voice-replication research: word-count corpus grading, syntactic-fingerprint extraction (sentence rhythm, contractions, nominalizations) enforced as lint advisories, anchor-diversity and style/content-entanglement rules, NNG tone dials per variant, and long-form drift re-anchoring. v1.3 adds an owner-feedback maintenance loop (corrections as highest-grade evidence, fix-the-class discipline, retired-phrase mechanism) plus guards distilled from real owner reviews: signature-phrase rations, distribution-not-formula rhythm, referent discipline, audience-knowledge floor, register fencing, and a self-narrating meta-label tell. v1.4 adds the empirical research layer to the bundled AI-signs field guide (quantified structural tells from 2023-2026 corpus studies, the 99.6% expert-detection and AI Penalty evidence, structure-vs-texture discipline, epigram budgets, epistemic stance markers, flatten-and-reconstruct guidance) and threads the new guards through the package blueprint and self-check. v1.5 adds the feedback-disposition discipline (every review item applied, overruled with stated reason, or routed AND landed in the owner's ledger), the restatement sweep (a corrected spec updated everywhere it is stated), and the once-per-document epigram rule to the field guide. v1.6: blind-generalisation-test learnings - voice_lint.py gains a deterministic repeated-phrase check (once-per-document rule, with repeat_allowlist); the blueprint mandates accreting approved output as sample anchors (corrections alone cannot teach a voice); the field guide encodes countable texture budgets and the scaffold-slots-are-fabrication-traps corollary. v1.7 encodes the rulebook/casebook separation in the blueprint: ledgers are maintainer-facing and stay out of the drafting load path, rules stand alone with one generic illustration, and recognition of previously reviewed material is never announced nor a substitute for a fresh pass. v1.7.1 widens the structural negative-parallelism lint pattern to the 'X, never the Y' and 'not the X, but the Y' contrast families - pattern-level checks over phrase bans.
